## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one: Fixes #123 -->

## Why?

<!-- The problem or motivation. If this was not discussed in an issue first
     and it is a large change, please open an issue instead — it saves both
     of us a review round-trip. -->

## How did you check it?

<!-- Commands you ran, tests you added, manual steps. "npm test passes" plus
     one sentence about the new/changed cases is perfect. -->

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything you are unsure about, trade-offs, follow-ups. Optional. -->

---

- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] If I used AI tools to help write this, I have personally read, understood,
      and verified every line I am submitting (AI assistance is welcome here —
      unreviewed output is not)
